user_prompt: explain bernoulli’s principle using the airplane wing example

style_bible.visual_style: Realistic with natural colors, slight cinematic contrast, shallow depth of field to isolate subjects, smooth textures on surfaces
style_bible.camera_rules: Use mostly steady shots with slow dolly or pan movements, maintain consistent screen direction, avoid jump cuts, keep subject centered or following rule of thirds
style_bible.lighting_rules: Soft natural daylight from left side, warm color temperature, avoid harsh shadows, maintain consistent lighting across scenes
style_bible.continuity_rules: Main subject wears a blue pilot uniform with white insignia, short brown hair; location is a modern aircraft hangar with visible airplane wing and tools; props and wardrobe remain consistent; no sudden changes in position or props

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Introduce the pilot standing next to the airplane wing in the hangar explaining Bernoulli’s principle.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: male pilot, blue uniform with white insignia, short brown hair
- location: aircraft hangar with airplane wing, toolboxes, large windows

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: medium shot, pilot centered
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow dolly in
- subject & action: pilot stands by wing, gestures toward upper wing surface at 1s, points along wing curve at 2s, looks at camera at 3s
- environment details: airplane wing with visible airfoil shape, toolboxes in background, sunlight through windows
- lighting: soft daylight from left, warm tone
- cinematic look: slight film grain, moderate contrast, shallow depth of field

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: close-up on pilot’s hands tracing wing surface
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: static
- subject & action: pilot’s hands move smoothly along upper wing surface from leading edge to trailing edge
- environment details: detailed wing texture, rivets, slight dust particles visible
- lighting: soft side light from left
- cinematic look: high sharpness on hands and wing, blurred background

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: medium wide shot, pilot and wing visible
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow pan right
- subject & action: pilot nods confidently, points upward toward wing’s airflow path drawn in air
- environment details: airflow lines digitally visualized above wing, hangar interior
- lighting: consistent soft daylight
- cinematic look: balanced contrast, natural colors

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: slow dolly in, static, slow pan right
scenes.audio_cue: calm explanatory voiceover with subtle ambient hangar sounds

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Show airflow speeding over the wing and causing pressure difference visually.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: male pilot, blue uniform with white insignia, short brown hair
- location: aircraft hangar with airplane wing, toolboxes, large windows

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: wide shot, wing and pilot on left
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow dolly left
- subject & action: pilot gestures upward, airflow lines begin to appear above wing at 1s, lines accelerate by 2s, pilot watches airflow at 3s
- environment details: airplane wing, hangar beams, sunlight shafts
- lighting: soft daylight from left
- cinematic look: moderate contrast, clear airflow visualization

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: close-up on airflow lines over wing surface
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: static
- subject & action: airflow lines speed up over curved upper wing surface, slower airflow below wing visible at 5s, pressure icons appear subtly
- environment details: wing texture, rivets, slight haze
- lighting: soft side light
- cinematic look: sharp focus on airflow, slight glow effect on lines

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: medium shot, pilot pointing at airflow difference
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow pan left
- subject & action: pilot explains pressure difference, nods at 9s, final frame shows airflow lines clearly
- environment details: hangar interior, wing details
- lighting: consistent soft daylight
- cinematic look: natural colors, balanced contrast

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: slow dolly left, static, slow pan left
scenes.audio_cue: increasing intensity in voiceover with subtle whooshing airflow sounds

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Demonstrate lift generated by airflow difference with pilot showing wing lift movement.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: male pilot, blue uniform with white insignia, short brown hair
- location: aircraft hangar with airplane wing, toolboxes, large windows

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: medium shot, pilot holding small model wing
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow dolly in
- subject & action: pilot lifts model wing slowly at 1s, tilts wing to show airflow at 2s, holds steady at 3s
- environment details: hangar background, workbench, tools
- lighting: soft daylight from left
- cinematic look: shallow depth of field, warm tones

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: close-up on model wing with airflow lines
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: static
- subject & action: airflow lines speed over upper surface, pilot’s fingers steady model, lift arrow appears at 5s
- environment details: wing texture, slight dust particles
- lighting: soft side light
- cinematic look: sharp focus, subtle glow on airflow

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: medium wide shot, pilot smiles and lowers model wing gently
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow pan right
- subject & action: pilot nods, places model on table, final frame on model wing
- environment details: hangar interior, toolboxes
- lighting: consistent soft daylight
- cinematic look: natural colors, balanced contrast

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: slow dolly in, static, slow pan right
scenes.audio_cue: conclusive voiceover with soft ambient hangar sounds and gentle uplifting music
